ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "foot_length_cm" REAL /* Length of the foot in centimeters */,
  "asia_size" INTEGER /* Shoe size in Asia */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* Shoe size in Europe */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* Shoe size in the United States */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* Shoe size in the United Kingdom */,
  "jp_size" INTEGER /* Shoe size in Japan */,
  "kr_size" INTEGER /* Shoe size in South Korea */,
  "cn_size" INTEGER /* Shoe size in China */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size conversion is applicable */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., sneaker, boot) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the size conversion data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_asia_size FOREIGN KEY ("asia_size") REFERENCES foot_length_ranges ("size"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_eu_size FOREIGN KEY ("eu_size") REFERENCES foot_length_ranges ("size"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_jp_size FOREIGN KEY ("jp_size") REFERENCES foot_length_ranges ("size"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_uk_size FOREIGN KEY ("uk_size") REFERENCES foot_length_ranges ("size"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_kr_size FOREIGN KEY ("kr_size") REFERENCES foot_length_ranges ("size"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_cn_size FOREIGN KEY ("cn_size") REFERENCES foot_length_ranges ("size"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_us_size FOREIGN KEY ("us_size") REFERENCES foot_length_ranges ("size")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Asia, Europe) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country or countries included in the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language used in the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "average_foot_length" REAL /* Average foot length in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing standard */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the standard is used */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the sizing standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sizing standard */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the standard was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the standard was last updated */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the standard is applicable */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., sneaker, boot) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the standard */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last updated the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foot_length_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foot length range */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the range applies to */,
  "min_cm" REAL /* Minimum foot length in centimeters for the range */,
  "max_cm" REAL /* Maximum foot length in centimeters for the range */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Shoe size corresponding to the range */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the range is applicable */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., sneaker, boot) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foot_length_ranges_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the profile belongs to */,
  "preferred_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the preferred region of the customer */,
  "foot_length_cm" REAL /* Foot length of the customer in centimeters */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Preferred shoe size of the customer */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the profile was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the profile was last updated */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Additional preferences (e.g., wide fit, narrow fit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_profiles_preferred_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who provided the feedback */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the feedback is related to */,
  "foot_length_cm" REAL /* Foot length of the customer in centimeters */,
  "reported_size" TEXT /* Size reported by the customer */,
  "actual_size" TEXT /* Actual size of the product received */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue or feedback */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the issue has been resolved */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., size, comfort, design) */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "feedback_source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., email, app, website) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the sale occurred */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product sold */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in stock */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the inventory is located */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product in stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_stock_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the product in stock */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., sneaker, boot) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the product was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is designed */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Whether the product is available for sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)
